templates.text: Increase your 401(k) contribution to capture more pre-tax savings.
templates.detail: Every $100/month increase saves ~$32/month in taxes at a 32% marginal rate. 2026 IRS limit is $23,500 (under 50).
templates.successTemplate: 401(k) contribution updated to {{input:amount | currency}}/month ({{calc:input.amount * 12 | currency}}/year). Estimated tax savings: {{calc:input.amount * 12 * 0.32 | currency}}/year.

templates.text: Set guilt-free spending allowances for each household member.
templates.detail: Fun money is no-questions-asked discretionary budget. Each person gets their own monthly allowance to spend on whatever they want.
templates.successTemplate: Fun money budgets updated. This is guilt-free — no questions asked.
